# Caddy access log fixtures (EXAMPLE / MOCK data)

Synthetic JSON lines that mimic the format Caddy writes to
/var/log/caddy/cercol_api_access.log. IPs are RFC 5737 documentation
ranges (192.0.2.x / 198.51.100.x / 203.0.113.x). User agents are
copy-paste from Google's published bot UAs but EXAMPLE-labelled
where needed.
